html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

EXCLUSIVE EDITION — March 21, 2026 — "All The News That Bleeds, We Print"

TERRITORY TITANS TEAR UP THE TURF!

Sir Caprice and Wu-Tang the Dragon Lock Horns in Bloodiest Week Yet

VENDETTA CITY — The cobblestones ran red with bootlegger blood this week as two criminal colossi carved up the city like a Thanksgiving turkey! In a spectacular display of underworld ambition, the dapper don known as Sir Caprice and the mysterious Oriental mastermind Wu-Tang the Dragon have painted the town crimson, claiming a staggering 195 territories between them in seven days of mayhem that would make Al Capone himself tip his fedora in respect.

Sir Caprice, that silver-tongued serpent of the society set, slithered his way to the top of the heap with 98 freshly conquered turfs, leaving a trail of demolished headquarters in his wake. Not to be outdone, Wu-Tang the Dragon breathed fire across the Eastern territories, snatching 97 prime pieces of real estate with the precision of a master assassin and the fury of a typhoon.

But hold onto your hip flasks, dear readers — the carnage doesn't end there! Vacation Steve, that sun-kissed scoundrel who supposedly operates his empire from a beach chair, managed to muscle his way into 48 new territories while sipping gin rickeys. His partner in paradise, Vacation Albert, wasn't far behind with 40 turfs of his own, proving that crime doesn't take a holiday when there's serious scratch to be made.

Meanwhile, the crimson-cloaked Blood Captain lived up to his sanguinary sobriquet, spilling just enough claret to claim 28 choice chunks of city blocks. Even the controversial kingpin Donald Trump managed to trump his competition, seizing 20 territories with his usual bombastic flair.

SPECIAL BULLETIN!
HEADQUARTERS HELL!

The most spectacular storming of the week belonged to Wu-Tang the Dragon, who demonstrated why they call him the "Scourge of the East Side" by obliterating a staggering 17 rival headquarters! Not content with mere territorial expansion, this Oriental overlord turned enemy strongholds into smoking ruins faster than a Tommy gun empties its drum. Sir Caprice, never one to be upstaged, answered with 13 headquarters of his own, turning Vendetta City into a veritable demolition derby of criminal real estate!

But for every king, there must be casualties in this chess game of crime. StreetKing, once the undisputed monarch of the avenues, found his crown considerably tarnished as he hemorrhaged 27 territories to hungrier hoodlums. The grandiose FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR discovered that imperial titles mean little when the bullets start flying, losing 22 of his precious principalities to more aggressive adversaries.

The mysterious vortex got sucked into a whirlpool of his own making, watching 21 turfs disappear faster than bathtub gin at a police raid. Ustaz Ice, that cold-blooded calculator of crime, found his operations melting under pressure as 21 territories slipped through his frostbitten fingers.

This week's violence netted the victorious villains over $28,000 in cold hard cash and enough artillery to arm a small revolution. Wu-Tang the Dragon led the looting parade with 120 raids, followed closely by Sir Caprice's 113 sorties into enemy territory.

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officers report that Flash Gordon was spotted streaking through the warehouse district at midnight, though whether this constitutes heroism or public indecency remains under investigation...

• John James Rambo was arrested for disturbing the peace after attempting to liberate a speakeasy using only a butter knife and patriotic speeches...

• Local precinct warns citizens to avoid Floyd's Barber Shop, as the proprietor has been "giving customers more than just a close shave," according to Detective Murphy's incident report...
